eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Florida; at 3:34 AM on SEP 11, 2019 Effective until 5:34 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Florida AMBER Alert has been issued for Jhene Clark, a black female, 11 months old, 1 foot tall, 40 pounds, black hair and brown eyes, last seen in the area of the 2000 block of Northeast 78th Lane in Ocala, Florida. The child may be in the company of Deangelo Clark, a black male, 30 years old, 5 feet 4 inches tall, unknown weight, black hair and brown eyes. They may be traveling in a 2008, black Mazda CX7, North Dakota tag number 328APC. They may be in the Manatee or Orange County areas. If located, DO NOT APPROACH. Contact law enforcement immediately. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this child, please contact the Marion County Sheriff's Office at (352) 732-9111 or 911. #FLAMBER.
